message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "pub.com" as pubcom #lightblue#white
participant prebidjs #lightgreen#white {prebid.js} 
participant sspmodule #orange#white{prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js }  
database SSPs  #pink#white   
box DSPS   group "#90EEFF;transparent;text-align:center;"    
    participant dsps1 #yellow#white     
end box 

note over gam : GAM/AdX  

User ->> pubcom: navigates browser to \n\n2.load configure execute\3.invoke ssb bid adapter4.ad request5traffic quality controls6.make bids requests7.respond wth bds8.pub ad controlssadwpriceadslect appropriate addconfigure k/v pair for selected ads.wait fr slot loadAt this point controloverthe loading processis transferred from PrebjstoGAM(final selection layer)loadslotrequestrespondwith winning admay be line itemrender resultalt[GAMDx highest bd]Prebdjshighest renderselectedSPshowhighest value advertisement@enduml
